title: Death Marker
body:
Installation Steps:

1. Copy the file **DeathMarker.jar** into the **/plugins** folder of your Minecraft server.


2. Restart the server or run the **/reload** command to activate the plugin.


3. Inside the game, use the following commands:

to show the location of your last death: 

```
/viewd
```


to hide the markers

```
/noviewd
```
